languages.text: "Ваши слова... Это же не просто страх, Ваша Светлость! Это противное Богу-Императору и всякому людскому... нечто!"
"Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"
languages.original_text: "Ваши слова... Это же не просто страх, Ваша Светлость! Это противное Богу-Императору и всякому людскому... нечто!"

traits.locale_text: "Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"
"Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"

"Your words sound bitter, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But it is true... Zarkov must have been a horrifying place for those of the First Call-Up. And yet the survivors grew stronger and found a way to use the world to survive. I didn't think the same could be true for such an... intangible force."
"Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"
"Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"

languages.text: 「あなたの言葉は辛辣に聞こえますが、それは真実です…初召集の者たちにとってザルコフは恐ろしい場所だったでしょう。それでも生き残った者たちは強くなり、この世界を生き延びる方法を見つけました。同じことがこの…無形の力にも当てはまるとは思いませんでした」
languages.original_text: "Your words sound bitter, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But it is true... Zarkov must have been a horrifying place for those of the First Call-Up. And yet the survivors grew stronger and found a way to use the world to survive. I didn't think the same could be true for such an... intangible force."

languages.text: "Sözleriniz... Bu sadece korku değil {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Bu, Tanrı İmparator'un ve tüm İnsanlığın gözünde bir iğrençliktir!"
languages.original_text: "Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"

traits.locale_text: "Sözleriniz... Bu sadece korku değil {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Bu, Tanrı İmparator'un ve tüm İnsanlığın gözünde bir iğrençliktir!"

languages.text: “您这话……这不只是恐惧，大人！那东西在神皇与全人类眼中可是亵渎之物！”
languages.original_text: "Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"

traits.locale_text: “您这话……这不只是恐惧，大人！那东西在神皇与全人类眼中可是亵渎之物！”

languages.text: "Eure Worte ... Es ist nicht nur Furcht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Es ist eine Abscheulichkeit in den Augen des Gottimperators und der gesamten Menschheit!"
languages.original_text: "Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"

traits.locale_text: "Eure Worte ... Es ist nicht nur Furcht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Es ist eine Abscheulichkeit in den Augen des Gottimperators und der gesamten Menschheit!"

languages.text: « Vos propos... Ce n'est pas de la peur, Votre Seigneurie ! Aux yeux de l'Empereur-Dieu et de toute l'humanité, c'est une abomination ! »
languages.original_text: "Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"

traits.locale_text: « Vos propos... Ce n'est pas de la peur, Votre Seigneurie ! Aux yeux de l'Empereur-Dieu et de toute l'humanité, c'est une abomination ! »

languages.text: «Sus palabras... ¡No es cuestión de miedo, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Es una abominación a ojos del Dios Emperador y de toda la Humanidad!».
languages.original_text: "Your words... It isn't just fear, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It is an abomination in the eyes of the God-Emperor and all of Humanity!"

traits.locale_text: «Sus palabras... ¡No es cuestión de miedo, mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Es una abominación a ojos del Dios Emperador y de toda la Humanidad!».
